resources.string: Expand or collapse expandable info text state indicator icon
Great! This store was added to your list of favourites!

We wish we could tell you what exactly will be in your Surprise Bag – but it’s always a surprise! The store will fill it with a selection of their unsold items. If you have questions about allergens or specific ingredients, please ask the store.

We wish we could tell you what exactly will be in your Surprise Bag - but it’s always a surprise! The store will fill it with a selection of their unsold items. If you’re concerned about allergens and ingredients that may be present, please review the information provided by the partner %1$shere%2$s*

*Too Good To Go does not make any representations as to its accuracy or completeness.
Your Surprise Bag is a surprise
Quickly access your favourite Surprise Bags when they are available.
We\'ve refunded the amount to the payment method you used to pay for this order. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
Please note that we\'ve logged your complaint but you won\'t be hearing more from us regarding this incident. We hope you\'ll get the chance to fight food waste with us soon.
The pending transaction has been cancelled and will disappear from your account. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
We\'ve restored the voucher you used to pay for this order, and it will be available for your next purchase.
Your refund is on its way
Thank you for letting us know. Along with our apologies, we\'d like to offer you a refund right away - or you can reach out to our Customer Care team if you\'d like to discuss this issue further.
Get in touch with Customer Care
We\'re sorry you had a bad experience
%1$sAlmost there!%2$s You’re one step closer to earning a badge.
As of %1$s, you can earn badges by completing certain activities in the app.
We’ll notify you when you make progress towards earning badges, and you can always view your progress on the Badges page.
Badges are based on your activity in the app as of %1$s.
Learn more about badges and how they work.
Keep an eye on the time - you need to collect your food donation within the time shown below.
You have multiple orders. Go to your order list.
You have multiple reserved Surprise Bags to collect. Go to your order list.
You have one reserved Too Good To Go Parcel. %1$s. Go to your order page.
You have one reserved Surprise Bag to collect from %1$s. %2$s. Go to your order page.
Your Catering order will be packed with delicious surplus meals from local caterers and delivered overnight to your doorstep.
You can cancel your order in the app before we begin packing it. After that, it\'s already on its way!
Each order comes with heating and storage tips so you can enjoy your food at its best.
Keep an eye on the time—you need to collect your Surprise Bag at the specified collection time.
Your next-day delivery order is packed with delicious surplus food and delivered straight to your door.
It\'s a surprise! Your Surprise Bag will be packed with delicious treats left over at the end of the day.
Good Surprise Bags are sold out
Help us understand how we can improve
Please explain what other circumstances are preventing you from reserving a Surprise Bag:
What has stopped you from reserving a Surprise Bag?
We appreciate your time and effort
Let us know where you would like to save surplus food.
Try removing some of your filters to get more results.
Try changing your location or expanding your distance to get more results.
Invite your friends who haven\'t downloaded the app and have never saved a Surprise Bag.
Your friends must use your unique invitation link to download the app.
Turn on push notifications so we can let you know when your friends save their first Surprise Bags!
Spread the love for the planet by inviting your friends to try the Too Good To Go app!
Earn a voucher for each friend who joins and saves food!
Your friends get to save their first Surprise Bag or Too Good To Go Parcel, and you’ll get a %1$s voucher each time — all while helping the planet!
Earn as many %1$s vouchers as you can
Your friends get to save their first Surprise Bag, and you’ll get a %1$s voucher each time — all while helping the planet!
To invite your friends, tap ⚙️ in the top-right corner, then tap \'Invite your friends\'.
Invite as many friends as you want and earn a %1$s voucher for every first Surprise Bag they save. Ready to make a difference together?
Invite your friends and earn %1$s vouchers
Invite your friends who haven’t downloaded the app and have never saved a Surprise Bag.
This only works if your friends use your unique invitation link to download the app.
Invite as many friends as you want and earn a %1$s voucher for every first Surprise Bag or Too Good To Go Parcel they save. Ready to make a difference together?
Invite your friends who haven’t downloaded the app and have never saved a Surprise Bag or a Too Good To Go Parcel.
You have %1$d days from the time a voucher is issued until it expires.
But you can still invite your friends and make an impact!
Invite your friends to save their first Surprise Bag and earn a voucher for each one! There’s no limit to how many vouchers you can get, but hurry—this offer ends on %1$s.
Invite your friends to save their first Surprise Bag by %1$s and earn vouchers once it\'s collected. Together, you can help the planet!
Invite your friends who haven\'t downloaded the app and have never saved a Surprise Bag.
Your friends must use your unique invitation link to download the app.
Turn on push notifications, and we\'ll let you know when you earn a voucher.
You have %1$d days from the time a voucher is issued until it expires.
I’ve been using Too Good To Go. Get the app here, and help save good food from going to waste: %1$s
Help reduce food waste with Too Good To Go
Your friends get to save their first Surprise Bag and you’ll earn a %1$s voucher each time until %2$s—all while helping the planet!

But your impact continues! We appreciate your effort to help the planet by spreading the word. You can still keep making a difference. Tap ⚙️ in the top-right corner, then tap \'Invite your friends\'.

We'll use AI to analyse your photo and identify the food items it contains so we can create a recipe for you. The photo isn’t shared with anyone and is deleted or anonymised after analysis.

 By continuing, you give Too Good To Go permission to use the photo only for this purpose, in line with our User Terms and Privacy Policy.

 You also confirm that you own the photo, are allowed to upload it, it doesn’t contain identifiable people or personal information, and it doesn’t infringe anyone else’s rights.
We need access to your camera to suggest recipes based on your ingredients.
Order has already been cancelled or refunded
This order can no longer be cancelled.
Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
No code needed to deliver to my front door

We can\'t say exactly what your Catering order will include – it\'s always a surprise. The caterer will pack it with a selection of their unsold items. If you have questions about allergens or ingredients, please check the instructions included with your delivery.
What you get is a surprise
This Catering order can only be delivered within Poland
This Surprise Bag can only be delivered to selected postcodes.
By completing your Catering order, you agree to Too Good To Go\'s %1$sCatering – Conditions of Use%2$s, which govern the sale and delivery of your order.
Your Too Good To Go Catering order will be delivered directly to the address you provided.
You\'re set as available to collect on %1$s.
You\'re set as not available to collect on %1$s.
You\'re set as available to collect from %1$s to %2$s.
You\'re set as not available to collect from %1$s to %2$s.
You\'re set as available to collect on %1$s new days.
You\'re set as not available to collect on %1$s new days.
Days you\'re set as available to collect
Thank you for collecting this donation and for helping those in need.
Let stores know if there are any days that are exceptions from your regular collection days.
Let stores know which days of the week you\'re typically available to collect donations.
You have a reservation on a day you\'ve set yourself as not available to collect. Do you want to keep or cancel this reservation?
If you need help regarding the app or a specific reservation, please fill out the form and we\'ll get back to you as soon as possible.
Get alerts about new donations and important updates to your reservations.
Make sure your collection days are up to date so your partner stores know when to offer donations.
Your organisation has no donation offers from your partner stores right now. This could be because you are set as not available to collect today.
Your organisation has no new donation offers from your partner stores right now. Once you do, they\'ll show up here.
Your organisation hasn\'t reserved any donations yet. Once you do, your reservation history will show up here.
Your organisation has no reserved donations right now. Once you do, they\'ll show up here.
I don\'t have a charity ID
The charity ID is a unique code assigned to your charity upon its registration with Donations+. This code was sent to the email address used during registration.
We couldn’t find a charity with that ID. Please try a different one.
Too many attempts with an invalid ID. Please try again later.
Something went wrong while searching for your charity. Try again

The charity ID is a unique code assigned to your charity upon its registration with Donations+. This code was sent to the email address used during registration, which may be your charity’s general email address or the supervisor’s email address.\n\nIf your charity hasn’t registered yet or you need help finding your charity ID, please contact us, and we’ll be happy to assist you.
We\'re working on finding stores to match your organisation. This may take a few days or weeks. In the meantime, make sure you\'re ready to start receiving donations.
WE\'RE LOOKING FOR STORE MATCHES IN YOUR AREA

If you have any questions about allergens or specific ingredients, please visit the store’s own website for more information. Too Good To Go does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of this information.
Clicking Continue will take you to the store\'s own website with information about ingredients and allergens. Too Good To Go does not make any representations as to its accuracy or completeness.
If you have any questions about allergens or specific ingredients, please ask the store.
Once you\'ve declined this donation offer, you will no longer be able to reserve it later.
Are you sure you want to decline this donation offer?
The Danish Veterinary and Food Administration’s inspection reports
To update your collection days later, go to Account > Collection days.
Please enter your country code and phone number
We’ll only send relevant updates — like new available donations or important info about your reservations.
Get notified about new available donations and important updates to your reservations.
Receive confirmations when your charity reserves and collects donations.
Please enter the phone number you’d like us to use for text notifications.
HOW WOULD YOU LIKE TO RECEIVE UPDATES?
To update your notification settings later, go to Account > Notifications.
Your charity has cancelled this reservation.
Unfortunately, the store has had to cancel your reservation.
The collection time has been updated. See the changes below.
You\'re set as available to collect on this day.
Your charity will be offered this donation only if the primary collector declines it after the store has published it.
Looks like there are no planned donations for this day. Check back later or explore other dates!
Your charity will have priority to reserve this donation if the store publishes it.
This donation is not yet confirmed. You will be able to reserve it if the store publishes it.
This is a weekly overview of donations stores expect to offer your charity. These donations haven\'t been published yet and can\'t be reserved.
You\'re set as not available to collect on this day. Set yourself as available to see planned donations.
This donation has been reserved for you.
A confirmation will automatically appear as soon as your collection has been confirmed.
Share this code with a store employee for them to confirm the collection:
By reserving this donation, you agree to Too Good To Go’s Terms & Conditions
Remember to update your collection availability under Account > Collection days.
\'%s\' did not match with anything, try again or use #manual address entry#
You can always #enter your address manually#
Open your banking app to confirm the payment.
Confirm your payment on the MB WAY app
Thank you for your purchase, complete your payment by logging into you bank account, authorize the PayTo agreement and approve the payment terms.
Open your UPI app to confirm the payment
Get the code from your banking app.
The entered card brand isn\'t supported
Select the card brand you prefer to pay with. This is optional.
Do you want to use face or fingerprint authentication to verify your future reservations with this payment method?
Date too far in the future
Cardholder birthdate (YYMMDD) or Corporate registration number (10 digits)
Invalid Cardholder birthdate or Corporate registration number
There was an error loading available payment methods
Tap here to change your payment method
We\'re not quite ready in your selected country. We hope to be up and running soon!
Take a screenshot or save the QR code, open your banking application and upload the QR code to verify the details and complete the payment.
Take a screenshot or save the QR code, open your banking application and upload the QR code to verify the details and complete the payment.
This QR code is valid for %s
Use your banking app to scan the QR code or copy the PIX code below to complete your payment.
Take a screenshot or save the QR code, open your banking application and upload the QR code to verify the details and complete the payment.
Take a screenshot to upload in the UPI app or scan the QR code using your preferred UPI app to complete the payment.
By reserving this meal you agree to Too Good To Go\'s %1$s
There is currently a general problem with credit card payments. If you experience an error using your credit card, please try another payment method. We apologise for the inconvenience.
When you pay by card, please note that your bank may add a fee.
Thank you for your purchase, please use the following coupon to complete your payment.
Download your Direct Debit Instruction (DDI / Mandate)
Thank you for your purchase, please use the following information to complete your payment.

CO2e stands for carbon dioxide equivalent. While CO2 only accounts for carbon dioxide, CO2e accounts for carbon dioxide as well as all other greenhouse gases.\n\nTo calculate your CO2e avoided, we partnered with:
Save your first Surprise Bag to see how much impact it makes!
Time of hot showering, heated by an electric boiler, normal showerhead (20 l/min)
Time of hot showering, heated by an electric boiler, normal showerhead (5 gal./min)
Here\'s what your avoided CO2e equals to:
Several of your reservations have been changed. Click below to see more details.
Several of your reservations have had their collection times changed. Click below to see more details.
%1$s has changed the collection time to %2$s %3$s.
Unfortunately, we have had to cancel your order from %1$s.
Unfortunately, we have had to cancel your order.
We\'ve refunded the amount to the payment method you used to pay for this order. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
The pending transaction has been cancelled and will disappear from your account. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
We\'ve restored the voucher you used to pay for this order, and it will be available for your next purchase.
Unfortunately, the store had no surplus food left to save and had to cancel your order.
The store unfortunately had no food left and had to cancel your food donation.
We have no updates.\nPlease check again later.
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
As our mission is to fight food waste, we want to see every Surprise Bag saved!

If you need to cancel a Surprise Bag you\'ve reserved, please do so at least 2 hours before the collection time starts – open your in-app receipt and click “Cancel reservation”. This way someone else has a chance to save it.
We won’t charge you for this order, and you’ll receive an email shortly with more details.

You have already contacted us about this order, and we’re working on getting back to you. Please only send another message if you have something new to share so we can keep our response times as short as possible.
Got something new to share about this order?

We do our best to get back to you within 2 business days. In certain cases and due to holidays, it may, however, take us longer. Also, remember to check your Spam folder in case our email got delivered there instead of your inbox.
Files too big, unable to send contact request. Please try again with less / smaller files
We\'ll include your original message when we forward this enquiry to our Customer Care team. Please add your additional questions or comments in the Message field below.
If you haven\'t found an answer to your question in our Help Center, fill out the form below to contact us.
If you need help regarding a specific order, please fill out the form and we\'ll get back to you as soon as possible.
Got a question about an order?
Know a store you\'d like to see on Too Good To Go? Let us know about it below.
Adding pictures of the food you received in your Surprise Bag will make it easier for us to understand what went wrong and help us improve in the future.
Adding photos of your Parcel’s contents or any damage will make it easier for us to understand what went wrong and help you faster.
Please add a photo of your order
Please add a photo of your order
I have an app related enquiry
I had a bad experience with an order
I would like my local store to join
Let us know what this is regarding
Please help us improve by telling us what was wrong and adding at least one picture of the entire contents of your Surprise Bag.
We\'re sorry to hear that the Surprise Bag didn\'t live up to your expectations.
We can\'t respond to individual requests, but you can keep up with the latest Too Good To Go news by following us on social media and signing up for our newsletter.

I have an issue with my Catering order

I want to cancel a Too Good To Go Parcel
I have an issue with my Parcel order
I want to work for you

I wasn\'t satisfied with the amount of food I received
I want to follow up on a previous enquiry

I received a damaged next-day delivery order
I have an issue with my next-day delivery order
I have an issue with my next-day delivery order
The store had no food left when I arrived
The collection time for my order was changed
The store was closed when I arrived

For us to be able to get back to you, we need you to verify your email address first – tap the button below to get your verification link.\n\nOnce you’ve verified your email, you’ll be able to contact us.
This order is no longer active as its collection window has already closed. Please select a different topic for your enquiry or connect the correct order to it.
The collection window for this order hasn’t closed yet. Please select a different topic for your enquiry or connect the correct order to it.
Did you select the right topic?
Turn on availability notification for this Surprise Bag
You’ll get a notification on your selected days only when this Surprise Bag becomes available.
We’ll notify you on the days you selected when this Surprise Bag becomes available.
You’ve just missed it. Set a notification for next time it becomes available.
You’ve just missed this Surprise Bag. Set a notification for next time it becomes available.
You’ve just missed it, but we’ll notify you next time it’s available.
You’ve just missed this Surprise Bag, but we’ll notify you next time it’s available again.
This discount can be used for payments in the Too Good To Go app, at eligible stores in %1$s.
Discount turned off. Maximum allowed order value: %1$s
Collect %1$d stamps on our new Loyalty Card and unlock a voucher worth %2$s.
Collect %1$d stamps on our new Loyalty Card and unlock a voucher worth %2$s.
Tap on the heart icon to add it to your favourites
We\'re expanding Too Good To Go as fast as we can, but it looks like we haven\'t made it to this area yet.
Get food waste tips and stay up to date on everything Too Good To Go.
Make your feed a bit greener
No stores in this area, yet!
Search by street name or city
If you cancel now, you won\'t be able to reserve this Surprise Bag again for the next 60 minutes.
If you cancel this reservation, you won’t be able to reserve this Surprise Bag again for the next hour.
To help prevent the food from going to waste, the price may decrease throughout the day.
To help prevent the food from going to waste, the price of this Surprise Bag may decrease throughout the day.
We need another way to contact you in case we can\'t help you through the chat.
We can\'t add this email address. Please try another one.
Would you like to change your email address to the one below?\n\n%1$s
Alternatively, you can type in the code from the email below.
Code not recognised, please check again.
Click the button in the email to log in.
Please type in your email again to receive a new code.
It looks like you\'re having trouble with the code
Please try again later or choose a different way to log in.
Too many login attempts with this email address
This could be because you have tried changing your email address more than 3 times within the last 24 hours, or because the provided email address is already in use.
You\'re currently logged in as a store. Log into your consumer account instead and check back!
Your Favourites list is empty. Add Surprise Bags to your Favourites and check back.
You appear to be offline. Please check your internet connection.
You’re not logged into the Too Good To Go app. Log in and check back!
Sorry, none of your Favourites are available right now. This widget refreshes every two hours, so keep checking back!
We\'ll send a notification next time this Surprise Bag is available.
Your favourite stores have food that needs saving
Tap the heart icon on a store to add it to your favourites and it will show up here.
Don’t miss out when your favourite Surprise Bags are back.
You can set a one-time notification for the next available Surprise Bag, or get recurring notifications on selected days.
Tap the heart icon to favourite a Surprise Bag and unlock notifications.
Add a Surprise Bag to your Favourites
Open the sold-out Surprise Bag in your Favourites and toggle on notifications.
You’ll get one notification when it’s back. For another, simply toggle the one-time notifications on again.
It’s first come, first served – some Surprise Bags go fast, so don’t wait!
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
Collect a meal nearby right now
Flash Collections are meals you need to save almost straight away. Before you reserve, make sure you can get there on time.

Best Before labels are indicators of optimum quality, not safety. That means if the date has passed but the food looks, smells, and tastes fine, then it\'s good to eat. Food labelled with a Use By date has to be eaten by the date shown.
Recipes viewed in the last 30 days
Quickly snap a photo of the ingredients you want to use.
Get instant recipes tailored to the ingredients you already have.
Easily switch between your ingredients and step-by-step instructions as you cook.
We keep generated recipes in your history for 30 days. Save it now to keep it permanently.
Would you like to save this recipe?
Personalised recipes made from the ingredients you already have.
GOOD FOR YOU, GOOD FOR THE PLANET
Snap your ingredients, and we’ll turn them into recipes you can make right away.
Show us your ingredients, and we’ll suggest delicious recipes you can make right now.
Try adding different photos or adjusting your preferences, and we’ll suggest recipes that match.
All your favourite recipes in one place.
Something went wrong. Please try again
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
We can\'t process this right now. Please try again later.
You appear to be offline. Please check your internet connection.
Please enable location for the Too Good To Go app in your phone settings.
Tap the button to enable GPS or choose a location above.
Your location is unavailable.\n\nTry again or choose a location above.
Asking a friend to collect for me

You can send the collection invitation to several people, but only the first to accept will have the rights to collect on your behalf.\n\nKeep in mind that we can\'t track who accepts the invitation. So, if you send it to a larger group, you\'ll need to coordinate with them directly.

For you to cancel a Surprise Bag that a friend has agreed to collect, your friend will need to return the invitation to you first. They can do so by tapping the “Return invitation” button on the Collection details screen.

If you change your mind, you can cancel the invitation to collect by simply tapping the “I’m collecting” button on your order.\n\nIf your friend has already accepted the invitation, you\'ll need to ask them to return it to you by tapping the Return invitation button on the Collection details screen.
If your friend can\'t open the invitation you\'ve sent, it might be because you\'ve switched back to I\'m collecting. This action cancels the invitation, and you\'ll need to resend it to your friend.
Can I invite multiple friends to collect?
How do I cancel a Surprise Bag that a friend has agreed to collect?
I want to collect myself instead
My friend can’t open the invitation I’ve sent them
After accepting the invitation to collect, you can collect the Surprise Bag just as if you had made the reservation yourself.
If you can no longer collect for your friend, you can return the invitation to the sender by tapping the Return invitation button on the Collection details screen.
How do I collect for someone else?
What if I can no longer collect for my friend?
No, reservations can only be made through the Donations+ app. Make sure to use the app to browse, reserve, and collect donations.
We use passwordless authentication. Simply enter the email address you used to register with the Donations+ app, and you’ll receive an email with a one-time code to access the app.

To ensure the correct charity collects the donation, the volunteer representing the charity must provide a collection code to the store employee. This code is available in the app, so be sure to share it with the volunteer before the collection.

If you have enabled push notifications in the app on your mobile device, you’ll receive a notification when a donation becomes available. You can also open the app at any time to check for available donations.
Open Donations+, find the donation you want to reserve, then click “Reserve”. We’ll send you a reservation confirmation with all the relevant details about the donation and its collection.

Donations+ addresses common challenges faced by charities in managing food donations, such as:

- Lack of transparency around donation details and collection that makes it harder to plan and avoid food waste.
- Difficulty in communicating with businesses to reserve and collect donations.
- Time-consuming scheduling and coordination issues.
- Limited visibility into available donations, with partnerships often restricted to just a few stores.

Donations+ helps solve these issues by:

- Sending push notifications to alert you when donations become available.
- Providing clear details about the donation contents in the app before you reserve.
- Allowing you to track the status of reserved donations and view your collection history.
- Reducing manual tasks through digital reservations and confirming collections with unique collection codes.
- Connecting you to multiple stores, expanding your opportunities to secure donations.

Donations+ is an app offered by Too Good To Go that enables charities to effortlessly connect with businesses providing food donations. Charities can reserve donations through the app and collect them within the specified collection window using a unique collection code. This way, Donations+ helps reduce food waste while supporting those in need.
You can cancel your reservation directly in the app. Simply go to the Reserved donations section, select the donation you wish to cancel, and follow the prompts to complete the cancellation.
The donation may have been cancelled by the store or reserved by another charity before you had the chance to secure it. We recommend checking the app regularly for new donation offers.
Can I reserve a donation via a web browser?
What if I forget my password?
How do volunteers collect a donation on behalf of a charity?
How do I know if a food donation is available?
How do I reserve a donation?
What challenges does Donations+ help solve for charities?
Who should we contact if we need to cancel a donation reservation?
I received a notification about a new donation, but it’s not showing in the app. Why?
How Too Good To Go works

The Surprise Bags you buy on Too Good To Go are a surprise, which means that we can\'t offer upfront information about allergens. If you have allergies, please ask the store when you collect your meal. Should the bag include food you are allergic to, please get in touch with us.\nIf you have dietary requirements such as vegetarian, we suggest that you use the filter option in the browse tab to search for food that fits you.
No, all purchases need to be made through the app. This makes the process a lot easier and the collection quicker.
Yes, please take your phone when collecting your order. In the store you\'ll need to swipe your order and show it to the staff, who will then hand over your Surprise Bag.

Date labels can cause a lot of unnecessary food waste! It pays to know that Best Before labels are indicators of optimum quality, not safety. That means if the date has passed but the food looks, smells, and tastes fine, then it\'s good to eat. Food labelled with a Use By date has to be eaten by the date indicated.
You can save your payment card while making a purchase in the app. The payment card can then be used for following purchases.

With Too Good To Go you can save food from the restaurants, cafes and stores that are on the app. Instead of having to throw away food at the end of the day, these places offer what they have in Surprise Bags. The actual contents will be a surprise until you get there!

Find a meal near you, purchase it through the app and turn up in the store within the given collection time. Show the staff your order to receive your Surprise Bag - and give them a high-five to celebrate that you just made a difference together.

1/3 of food is wasted so you're doing a great thing and hopefully having a bit of fun whilst you do it!

Stores plan their supply according to demand, and they know they need to have enough food so as not to run out. This does mean that there\'s usually surplus at the end of the day, and they can predict how much. If they get this wrong, then the number of Surprise Bags can be adjusted. So if they have less than predicted it\'s possible that your order can be cancelled.
If you no longer want to participate in our mission to prevent food waste, you can easily delete your Account by going to Profile > Manage Account > Account Details.

We always strive to answer enquiries as fast as possible and will respond via email to the address connected to your Too Good To Go account. Please check your spam filter as our answer could have gone astray and ended up there.

We\'re working on it! We want to fight food waste everywhere so please check back at a later time. You\'re also very welcome to tell stores in your area about Too Good To Go and encourage them to join us! Stay tuned and follow us on Instagram for updates on new store and city openings!

Most of our stores have more favourites than meals available per day. So sending everyone a notification when they have something for sale would result in many people not being able to save a meal before they are sold out and most likely being disappointed.
To collect your order, you need be logged into the account used to make the purchase. It is therefore not possible to transfer your order to someone else.

Stores can\'t predict exactly what kind of food they will have left at the end of the day. Instead of throwing away perfectly good food, these places offer whatever they may have in Surprise Bags. It\'s always a surprise!
\nThe Too Good To Go widget lets you track the availability of the Surprise Bags you\'ve added to your Favourites without having to open the Too Good To Go app.

\nOnce installed on the Home screen of your mobile device, the widget will regularly check the Surprise Bags added to your Favourites and display the ones that are currently available. To quickly reserve an available Surprise Bag, simply tap on it in the widget, and you will be re-directed to the reservation page in the app.
\nThe Too Good To Go widget checks your Favourites list every two hours.
\nYou can see when the widget was last updated in the top-right corner of the widget.

1. On a Home screen, touch and hold an empty space.
2. Tap Widgets.
3. Touch and hold the Too Good To Go widget. You'll get images of your Home screens.
4. Slide the widget to where you want it. Lift your finger.
\nYes, you control which Surprise Bags the widget tracks by adding them to your Favourites.
\nYes, the widget adapts to both light mode and dark mode.
● What is a Too Good To Go widget?
\n\n● How does the Too Good To Go widget work?
\n\n● How often does the Too Good To Go widget update?
\n\n● How do I know when the widget was updated?
\n\n● How do I install the Too Good To Go widget?
\n\n● Can I choose which Surprise Bags the Too Good To Go widget is tracking?
\n\n● Does the widget work in dark mode?
I have dietary requirements or allergies
Can I pay with cash in store?
Do I need to bring my phone when I pick up my order?

The “Dynamic price” tag that you see on some Surprise Bags indicates that their price may change depending on the time of the day and interest in the Surprise Bag. Some Surprise Bags may even end up being priced at as low as 25% of their original value.

By matching the price with the current demand, we encourage stores to save more food that would otherwise go to waste and offer better discounts on specific meals for you as a customer.

The price you see next to a sold-out Surprise Bag where Dynamic pricing applies is the price the Surprise Bag sold for last.
What\'s the difference between Best Before and Use By dates?
How do I add a payment card?
How does Too Good To Go work?
How does the store know how much food will be left the following day?
How do I delete my account?
What is a Too Good To Go widget and how does it work?
I have contacted you, but have not received an answer yet
Why are there no stores in my area?
Can I receive notifications when one of my favourite stores add meals in the app?
Can someone else pick up my meal for me?
Why can\'t you tell me what is going to be in my Surprise Bag?
What\'s the difference between Best Before and Use By dates?

We\'re sorry to hear you had a bad experience. The food you save with Too Good To Go is what the store has left at the end of the day, so it\'s always a surprise.\n\nIf you\'ve received food that has gone bad, did not meet the expected value or had another unfortunate experience with your order, please contact us.

You can cancel your Catering order in the Too Good To Go app before we begin preparing and packing it. Just open the app, find your upcoming order, and select the option to cancel. Once preparation has started, cancellations are no longer possible. However, if you have a valid reason, you may still be able to request a refund.

You can cancel your next-day delivery order in the Too Good To Go app before we begin preparing and packing it.\nOpen the app, find your upcoming order, and select \"Cancel\".\nOnce preparation has started, cancellations are no longer possible. However, if you have a valid reason, you may still be able to request a refund.
You can cancel your Surprise Bag reservation up to 2 hours before your collection time in the Too Good To Go app. This helps ensure someone else can save the food.
We\'re sorry to hear there was an issue with your Catering order. Please tell us what went wrong, and we\'ll do our best to help make it right.

We're sorry to hear that something didn't work out with your Too Good To Go Parcel!

Too Good To Go Parcels are a completely new offering and we're currently still testing the concept. As with all things new, we know there may be unforeseen issues we need to solve and we appreciate your feedback.
Please go ahead and share what went wrong with your order so we can fix the issue and offer a better experience next time you purchase a Too Good To Go Parcel.

Please check your order list in the app, this is where you can always find all your order details.\n\nIf something went wrong due to technical issues, and the amount was reserved by your bank, then it will be released but can take up to 10 business days.
We\'re sorry there was an issue with your next-day delivery order. Tell us what went wrong and we\'ll do our best to help make it right.
If you arrived within the collection time and the store had no food left for you, please contact us.
If you have had an allergic reaction, have become ill after consuming a product you have received, or wish to report an imminent hygiene problem in the store, please contact us.
Too Good To Go orders have to be collected within the specified time frame shown in the app. If you arrived during this time frame and the store was closed then please contact us.

Too Good To Go orders need to be collected within the specified time frame shown in the app. It is therefore important that you keep track of time when you have made an order.\n\nIf you realise that you can\'t make it, it\'s possible to cancel your order up to 2 hours before the collection time starts.
I had a bad experience with my order
How can I cancel my Catering order?
How can I cancel my next-day delivery order?
How can I cancel my Surprise Bag reservation?
How do I know if my order was completed?
The store didn\'t have any food for me when I went to collect it
I have a safety concern about my order
The store was closed at the collection time

We\'d love you to help us spread the word about Too Good To Go and get even more people involved in the fight against food waste. You can follow us on Facebook and Instagram, and tell your friends about the app.
Awesome! You can see our open positions and submit an application on our career site.
How can I help spread the word about Too Good To Go?
I would like to work for Too Good To Go

Hidden stores are specific to certain corporate partnerships and can\'t be accessed by the general public. The access codes are only available to those involved in these partnerships and are not controlled by Too Good To Go.
Are you sure you want to remove this store?
An update has just been downloaded.
Surprise Bag added to your Favourites.
Show your order in the app to a staff member to collect your Surprise Bag.
It\'s a surprise! When you buy a Surprise Bag, it will be filled with the delicious food that the store has left at the end of the day.
See the Danish Veterinary and Food Administration’s inspection reports
Every Dine-in experience is a surprise – we can’t reveal the menu in advance! For questions about allergens or specific ingredients, please ask the restaurant.
Show your table reservation in the app to a staff member, and they\'ll seat you for your Dine-in experience.
Every Dine-in experience is a surprise! Enjoy a unique meal crafted from what the kitchen has left that day.
The collection date of this Surprise Bag is: %1$s (%2$s days to go)
This store requires you to bring your own food container in order to collect your food.
The store will provide packaging for your food, but we encourage you to bring your own bag to carry it home in.
This store will provide everything you need to collect and bring home your food.
The store will provide packaging for your food, but please bring your own bag to carry it home in.
This store requires you to bring your own food container in order to collect your food. We also encourage you to bring your own bag to carry it home.
Something went wrong, please try again
Sorry! This Surprise Bag is no longer available.
Add to your favourites to easily find it again later
This Surprise Bag is a Flash Collection and needs to be saved shortly. Before you reserve, make sure you can get there on time.
Turn on availability notification for this Surprise Bag
Availability notifications are turned on for this Surprise Bag. Tap to edit.
Based on our users’ reviews showing how often this item appears in this Surprise Bag. The higher the number, the better your chances – the lower, the rarer it is.
This prediction is based on reports from other users who have previously saved this Surprise Bag.
*Not enough reviews to show a rating
Not enough reviews to show a rating
No reviews yet – give this offering a try and be the first to leave a review!
Please note that the store will charge a small fee for the packaging when you collect your Surprise Bag.
Please note that the store will charge a small fee for the packaging when you collect your Surprise Bag.
Because of the new packaging law you may be charged a small fee for the bag, when you collect your Surprise Bag in the store.
Because of the new packaging law you may be charged a small fee for the bag, when you collect your Surprise Bag in the store.
You must bring your own bag.
You must bring your own container and bag.
We recommend bringing your own bag.
A small packaging fee may apply.
A small packaging fee may apply due to local legislation.
Add this Surprise Bag to your Favourites to easily find it later
Please enter a valid email address
An error has occurred when fetching the license.
Stores who consistently deliver high-quality Surprise Bags and help the community fight food waste.
To see stores around you, please turn on location access or choose a location
We need your permission to use your location
Search for a city to find stores\nor use your location to see what\'s available nearby
We couldn\'t find any locations with that name\nTry updating your search or use your location to find stores near you.
Choose a location to see what\'s available
It looks like this is your first time using the Donations+ app. Let’s connect your account to your charity so you can view and reserve donations.
Donations+ is only available in selected countries. Pick one of the supported locations here to continue.
Please enter your country and email address below, and we’ll get in touch with more information about the Donations+ solution.
We’re happy you’re interested in the Donations+ solution. We’ll be in touch soon with more information.

Donations+ is an app offered by Too Good To Go that enables charities to effortlessly connect with businesses providing food donations.

Charities can reserve donations through the app and collect them within the specified collection window using a unique collection code. This way, Donations+ helps reduce food waste while supporting those in need.

If your charity hasn’t signed up yet and you’d like to learn more or join Donations+, tap the Get more info button below, and we’ll get in touch with more information.
Donations+ is only available in selected countries. Pick one of the supported locations below to continue.
The verification email might take a little while to arrive. If you didn’t get it right away, please wait a few minutes and check again.\nAlso, be sure to check your spam or junk folder.

If this is your first time logging into the Donations+ app, you can use any email address you’d like for your Donations+ account. We’ll connect you to your charity later.\n\nIf you’ve logged in before, please use the same email address linked to your existing account.
Which email address should I use?
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Please enter a valid email address – e.g. “name@mail.com”
It looks like you\'re trying to log in with a store account. Go to MyStore to continue.
By tapping Next, you agree to our Charity User Terms and Privacy Policy.
We’ve sent you a verification email. Tap the link in the email to continue.
Welcome to Too Good To Go\'s app that connects your charity with local stores donating food.
Are you sure you want to log out?
Go to full Terms and Conditions
Every time you save a Surprise Bag, you’ll earn a stamp on your Loyalty Card. Simple as that! Track your progress in the Profile tab.
Every time you save a Surprise Bag or a Too Good To Go Parcel, you’ll earn a stamp on your Loyalty Card. Simple as that! Track your progress in the Profile tab.
Every time you save a Surprise Bag or a Too Good To Go Parcel, you’ll earn a stamp on your Loyalty Card. Simple as that! Track your progress in the Profile tab.
Every time you save a Surprise Bag, you’ll earn a stamp on your Loyalty Card. Simple as that! Track your progress in the Profile tab.
Once you\'ve collected %1$d stamps, you\'ll unlock a %2$s voucher. We’ll add it to your account automatically.
Use your voucher as part of your payment when saving Surprise Bags in the app. It’s valid for %1$d days from the date it’s issued, so don’t forget to use it in time!
Use your voucher as part of your payment when saving Surprise Bags or Too Good To Go Parcels in the app. It’s valid for %1$d days from the date it’s issued, so don’t forget to use it in time!
Your Loyalty Card expires on %1$s. Be sure to complete it before then – any stamps you’ve collected will be lost after that.
A friend has accepted to collect your Surprise Bag from %1$s
Unfortunately, the Surprise Bag you agreed to collect has been cancelled.\nWe\'ve also let your friend know. Here\'s to better chances in the future!
We\'ve also let your friend know.
Your friend has collected your Surprise Bag from %1$s
Your friend can no longer collect your Surprise Bag from %1$s.
Your invitation to collect has been returned to you
%1$s has changed the collection time to %2$s between %3$s and %4$s.\nIf you can no longer collect, return the invitation to the sender.
The collection time has changed, and your friend can no longer collect your Surprise Bag from %1$s.\nThe new collection time is %2$s between %3$s and %4$s.
Thanks for your patience while we fix the issue.
Please zoom in to see the best stores and Surprise Bags nearby.

Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

You need to install the payment provider\'s app to complete the payment
436 million tonnes of food are wasted globally every year in the production phase.\n\nDo you know why?
Introducing the\nToo Good To Go Parcel
The packaging has a printing error
A mismatch between supply and demand
Why do food manufacturers have food waste?
That’s why we’ve created Too Good To Go Parcels that you can save – at half the retail price!
The correct answer is… \nall of the above!
Some items are no longer available
Explore more brands and a wider variety of Parcels – all in one simple order.
You won’t pay anything extra at checkout.
This fee covers the journey from our warehouse to your door. You\'ll see the exact amount at checkout.
You’ve reached the limit for Parcels in one order. To add more, please remove one from your basket first.
You can change your email address under \'Account details\' in the \'Profile\' tab.

This Parcel can only be delivered in Belgium
This Parcel can only be delivered in Denmark
This Parcel can be delivered in all of Spain, except for the Canary Islands, Ceuta, and Melilla
This Parcel can only be delivered in Metropolitan France
This Parcel can only be delivered within mainland Germany
This Parcel can only be delivered in Italy
This Parcel can only be delivered in the Netherlands
This Parcel can only be delivered in Poland
This Parcel can only be delivered in continental Portugal
This Parcel can only be delivered in mainland UK
This Parcel can be delivered anywhere in the US, except Alaska, Hawaii, and Puerto Rico.

It\'s a surprise! Your Too Good To Go Parcel will be filled with delicious surplus food from various food manufacturers.

By tapping Yes, you agree to receive personalised recommendations, exclusive offers, competitions, notifications about unfinished reservations, and promotions offered in collaboration with our partners via email and push notifications. You can withdraw your consent at any time – no hard feelings!
#I\'d like to receive email updates# from Too Good To Go ApS and its local affiliates.

We can’t say exactly what your order will include – it’s always a surprise. You’ll receive a selection of unsold items from the advertised category. For allergen or ingredient details, please check the information included with your delivery.
By placing a next-day delivery order, you agree to Too Good To Go\'s %1$s Next-Day Delivery – Conditions of Use%2$s, which govern the sale and delivery of your order.
Your next-day delivery order will be delivered directly to the address you provided.
We have sent an email to %1$s
Remember to check your spam folder
This app does not have any open source licenses.
You can change calendar settings in your device\'s settings. Go to settings?
Get a calendar reminder before the collection time starts.
Any unsaved changes will be lost.
Are you sure you want to exit?
Select which days you’d like an extra reminder to save food.
Be the first to hear about new stores joining the app, competitions, promotions in your area, and more.
Be the first to learn about new stores, great tips, updates, and even a food pun or two.
To access these notifications, you need to add your email address in Account details.
Notification setting must be changed in device settings. Go to settings?
Get notified about availability, feature updates, promotions, and more.
Receive personalised Surprise Bag recommendations and alerts.
Receive updates related to your order and other essential app notifications. Recommended for a seamless app experience.
We love hearing from you – your feedback helps us make things even better.
What could we do to improve your experience?
How likely are you to recommend this Too Good To Go Parcel to a friend or a colleague?
How likely are you to recommend ordering a Too Good To Go Parcel to a friend?
Cancelling this late may result in food going to waste. Did you know that you can ask a friend to collect your Surprise Bag for you?
Stores can\'t know exactly what will be left at the end of the day, so what you get in your Surprise Bag is always a surprise.
Getting a fun treat for myself or others
Finding easy options to complement my meals
Knowing what matters most to you helps us personalise recommendations and enhance your experience.
Let us know your preferred collection window, and we\'ll recommend Surprise Bags that fit your routine.
WHEN DO YOU PREFER TO COLLECT?
We couldn’t find that exact location. Try searching using a street name or city.
Drag the map to reposition the pin
Show this to the store staff to collect your meal!
Swipe below and show the order to the staff. Make sure to swipe only when you\'re in the store ready to collect your meal.
Please turn on notifications for Too Good To Go in your phone settings
If the money has already been taken from your account, we\'ll refund you. Depending on the payment method you used, it may take up to 10 business days for the amount to appear in your bank account.
Let\'s find a Surprise Bag for you to save!
Add this Surprise Bag to your Favourites to find it faster next time.
Did you buy anything else in the store while collecting your Surprise Bag?
We love hearing from you and will use your feedback to improve what we do.
How much did you shop for besides your Surprise Bag?
Let us know by rating your order.
How did you like your Surprise Bag?
Was collecting your Surprise Bag the main reason you came to the store that day?

Would you consider buying from this store again?
We\'re processing the cancellation. Please check back in 5 min.
We\'ve restored the %1$s discount you applied.
If the changes are not reflected on your bank account, please contact your bank.

The store had no surplus food left to save and had to cancel your order. We\'ve refunded the amount to the payment method you used to pay for this order. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
We\'ve refunded the amount to the payment method you used to pay for this order. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.

The store had no surplus food left to save and had to cancel your order. The pending transaction has been cancelled and will disappear from your account. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
The pending transaction has been cancelled and will disappear from your account. This may take up to %1$s days for your bank to reflect.
The store had no surplus food left to save and had to cancel your order. We\'ve restored the voucher you used to pay for this order, and it will be available for your next purchase.
We\'ve restored the voucher you used to pay for this order, and it will be available for your next purchase.
We\'ve noticed that you didn\'t swipe this order:
Did you get your Surprise Bag?
A friend is collecting for you

We wish we could tell you what exactly will be in your Surprise Bag - but it’s always a surprise! The store will fill it with a selection of their unsold items. If you’re concerned about allergens and ingredients that may be present, please review the information provided by the partner %1$s* \n\n*Too Good To Go does not make any representations as to its accuracy or completeness.
If you want to collect the Surprise Bag yourself, ask your friend to return the invitation.
This is a reservation that you had agreed to collect for a friend.\n\nYour friend has been informed that the reservation has been cancelled.
To cancel your reservation, ask your friend to return your invitation first.
The invitation link will be cancelled
It may have been cancelled by the sender or accepted by someone else.
This is a reservation that you\'ve agreed to collect for a friend.
You need to be connected to the internet to cancel your invitation.
Make sure you\'re connected to the internet and try again.
This is a reservation that you had agreed to collect for a friend.\n\nYour friend has been informed that the reservation has been refunded.
If you can no longer collect, you can return the invitation to the sender.
Can you help me collect my Too Good To Go Surprise Bag from %1$s?\nSee invitation: %2$s\nLet\'s make a difference together.
You can always ask your friend to return the invitation if needed.
Once your friend has accepted, you will no longer be able to collect your Surprise Bag.
Waiting for your friend to accept the invitation
Only one friend can accept your invitation.
This feature isn\'t available for Surprise Bags reserved outside your region.
The invitation isn\'t valid in your region

Your organisation doesn\'t have any active store partnerships at the moment. We\'re working on finding stores to match your organisation, which may take a few days or weeks.
Here you can see which stores your organisation is partnered with and will receive donations from through the app.

Are you sure you want to remove your card?
It looks like we don\'t support this payment card. Please try again with another payment method
The reason could be a lack of funds or an error on the bank’s side. Please select a different payment method and try again.
We were unable to process your payment. Your payment card seems to have expired.
We were unable to process your payment. You might need to contact your bank to sort it out.
Sorry, there\'s a problem on our end. Please try again later.
Your Ticket Restaurant® card doesn\'t have enough funds.

License details for open source software

We\'re really sad to see you go — there are still so many meals waiting to be saved!\nIf you’re sure you want to say goodbye, tap the button below to permanently delete your account. Please note this cannot be undone.\nWant to keep your data? If you’d like a copy of your information before it disappears for good, you can export it via the Legal section in your Settings before proceeding.
The account will no longer be available and all data will be permanently deleted.
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
The data the app collects includes your log in details and order history.\n\nLet us know and we will send you a report containing a copy of this data via email.
Please enter a valid email address
We\'ll send your data report to this email
We have sent your data to your email address
Request a copy of my data
You can always withdraw your consent through the Privacy settings in the app.
Do not sell or share my personal information
Please enter a valid email address
All the address information will be permanently deleted.

Well done! You’ve completed your Loyalty Card by collecting %1$d stamps. Your %2$s voucher has now been added to your account – enjoy!

To get a sweet treat or snack

Why did you choose this Surprise Bag?
Tell us about any dietary restrictions or special wishes, and we’ll suggest recipes just for you.
You\'ve reached today\'s recipe limit. Come back tomorrow for more!
Add photos of your ingredients, and we\'ll turn them into tasty ideas you can save here.
You\'ve reached your saved recipe limit. Remove a few to make room for new ones.
Know a store you\'d like to see on Too Good To Go? Let us know about it below.
We\'re not able to respond to individual requests, but please follow us on social media and sign up for our newsletter to stay in the know.
You can reduce your quantity and try again
You\'ve already reached the purchase limit for this store today. Try another store or check again tomorrow.
Sorry, the store is closed for reservations. Please check back later.
All the Surprise Bags from this store have already been saved for now. Please check back later.
Sorry, this Parcel has sold out. Let\'s find another one you\'ll love.
We couldn’t find the tax rates for the address you entered. Please check the address and try again.
Something went wrong. Sorry for the inconvenience – please try again later.
Sorry, there\'s a problem on our end. Please try again later.
Minimum purchase amount required was too high
The window of time to redeem the offer was too short
Didn\'t even know I had received a Special Reward
Didn\'t understand how to redeem the Special Reward

News from Too Good To Go
I agree with the %1$s terms & conditions %2$s and the %3$s privacy policy %4$s
I allow Too Good To Go to store my email address and name according to our privacy policy.
You can now invite a friend to collect your Surprise Bag for you!

We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your app experience, analyse app usage and traffic, and personalise content and advertisements. Below we explain what types of personal data we collect and how we use, share, and retain it.
For as long as you are opted in to receiving push messages.
For as long as you are a user of the app.
We will retain your account information for as long as your account remains active. If you decide to delete your account, we will delete your information in accordance with our deletion policies.

We collect statistical data to improve our app\'s performance and user experience. We keep such data for as long as it remains relevant for us in accordance with our deletion policies and depending on the purpose of the statistics. After this period, the data is aggregated or anonymised to further protect your privacy.

We collect technical information as described in the section “Technically necessary and statistical data” above. This information helps us identify and resolve any app-related issues and improve compatibility. Technical data is kept for as long as it remains relevant for us in accordance with our deletion policies and depending on the purpose of collecting the data. After this period, the data is aggregated or anonymised to further protect your privacy.

In some cases, we may be required or permitted to keep data for a longer period of time to comply with certain legal obligations. We will ensure that any data retained for legal purposes is protected in accordance with local law.

The storage periods for data collected through our app vary depending on the specific purpose for which the data is processed. While we don\'t utilise session cookies or persistent cookies in the same way as websites, we do keep data that serves similar purposes. We will outline the typical storage periods for data collected via our app below, but please note that these may be subject to change in accordance with legal requirements or business needs. You can stay up to date with any changes via our %1$s.
How long do we keep your data?

Account information (hashed), i.e. email address, phone number, country and postal code, birthdate, your gender identification, Too Good To Go user ID, Apple/Google advertising ID (\"IDFA/GAID\"), and the other account information that you have provided to us in the app, including your preferences
User agent information and device properties (IP address, browser, operating system, device type, browser version, language preferences, app version)
Conversion information (e.g. whether a purchase or reservation occurred, the purchase value and currency, including the transaction ID to prevent duplicate counting)
Information about your usage of the app, including your navigation in the app, such as the screens and stores you view
How you have interacted with our online advertising, including advertiser Click ID (unique identifier assigned to each click made on an ad)
Hashed identifier for measurement (ICM): where used, an on-device SHA-256 hash of your email address may be shared for matching and measurement purposes.

We use your personal data for marketing purposes in order to be able to show you personalised advertisements and content tailored to your interests. We also use this data to identify potential users with similar interests who may wish to join us in our vision of minimising food waste. In addition, this information is used to measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns and to improve our advertising. We share this information with our third-party advertising partners who may also use this information for the purpose of profiling and advertising. Some of these partners may process your data in other countries where data protection laws differ. By accepting marketing cookies, you consent to the use of your personal data for the profiling and marketing purposes described above. You can always withdraw your consent in the app\'s settings.
The types of data Too Good To Go collects from your use of the app for marketing and profiling purposes are:
Meta Platforms Ireland Limited for users based in the European Economic Area or Switzerland. Meta Platforms, Inc. for users based in all other countries.
Google Ireland Limited for users based in the European Economic Area or Switzerland. Google LLC for users based in all other countries.
LinkedIn Ireland Unlimited Company for users based in the European Economic Area or Switzerland. LinkedIn Corporation for users based in all other countries.
Microsoft Ireland Operations for users based in the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom and Switzerland. Microsoft Corporation for users based in all other countries.
Reddit Netherlands B.V., Netherlands, for users based in the European Economic Area, Reddit UK Limited, United Kingdom, for users based in the UK, and Reddit Inc., US, for all other users.
Apple Distribution International Limited, Ireland (ADI) for users based in the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom and Switzerland. Apple Inc. for users based in all other countries.

TikTok Technology Limited and TikTok Information Technologies UK (jointly) for users based in the European Economic Area, Switzerland, or the United Kingdom. TikTok Pte. Ltd. for users based in all other countries.
Too Good To Go ApS (self-hosted instance of open-source library)

Improves user experience by understanding preferences to provide personalised advertisements, relevant content, and tailored offers, while also helping evaluate the performance of marketing campaigns based on browsing patterns and interactions.

To show personalised ads by delivering interest-based advertisements and app recommendations tailored to users\' behaviour and preferences, as well as to measure ad performance by tracking how users interact with ads to assess their effectiveness and improve future campaigns. Applies to Android devices only.
SaaS mobile marketing analytics and attribution platform for the purpose of understanding which of our ads have the largest impact.
Attributing user referrals through shared referral links to ensure proper referral programme functionality.
Supports online marketing by collecting information about users to deliver personalised advertisements to the user and other similar Meta users on Meta\'s platforms.
To assign a unique identifier to users based on browser and device characteristics to help prevent fraud, detect abuse, and support security analytics.

Used to deliver and measure advertising campaigns and to promote Too Good To Go to other Google users with similar interests. Google Ads receives conversion information from our app (e.g. purchases) to measure ad performance and optimise ad bidding, including via aggregated conversion signals from GA4 and Integrated Conversion Measurement (ICM).
Fixing technical problems within the app.

Marketing measurement (incl. purchases), campaign attribution and bid optimisation in Google Ads; includes Integrated Conversion Measurement (ICM), which helps measure which ads lead to purchases and optimise bids when tracking is limited. Also prevents duplicate counting.
Supports online marketing by collecting information about users to promote products to other similar LinkedIn users.

Supports online marketing by collecting information about the user\'s interaction with the app, e.g. purchases, page views, information about clicks on an ad, pageviews, filling in a form, or downloading the app, with the purpose of optimising campaigns and promoting the app to other relevant users.
Supports online marketing by collecting information about users to promote products to other similar users of the Microsoft Bing platform.

Supports online marketing by collecting information about the user’s interaction with the app, e.g. purchases, page views, information about clicks on an ad, pageviews, filling in a form, or downloading the app, with the purpose of optimising campaigns and promoting the app to other relevant users.

Supports online marketing by collecting information about the user’s interaction with the app, e.g. purchases, page views, information about clicks on an ad, pageviews, filling in a form, or downloading the app, with the purpose of optimising campaigns and promoting the app to relevant Reddit users.
Enhances user engagement by providing personalised app recommendations and promotions tailored to user preferences during device setup and usage.
Supports online marketing by promoting the app in search results.
Supports online marketing by identifying the most likely TikTok users to install and use the Too Good To Go app.
Supports online marketing by collecting users\' unique IDs for the purpose of measuring and optimising the performance of our marketing activities.
That you have successfully created an account and logged in
Timestamp, including the dates of the first and the last sessions
Operating system (OS) and OS version as well as device model and wireless carrier
App version, browser name, user agent, and screen resolution
Information regarding technical problems within the app
Your consent status (your cookie and consent choices)
That you have completed a reservation or a purchase, collected a Surprise Bag or had a Too Good To Go Parcel delivered, or rated a purchase
Whether you have accepted email marketing upon sign-up
Whether you have accepted push messages upon sign-up and, if so, a push token
Your navigation in the app, e.g. the screens and stores you view

We collect technically necessary data to provide our app and ensure it functions properly. This data is essential to enable you to browse the app and use its features. We also use aggregated statistical data to measure app traffic and performance and to improve our app\'s reliability and user experience.
The types of data Too Good To Go collects for technically necessary and statistical purposes are:
We share this data with the following third parties:

Thanks for joining the fight against food waste!

When you unlock or add a discount voucher, they will appear here.
Collect a Surprise Bag that unlocks a Special Reward, and it\'ll appear here.
Special Rewards are surprise gifts from partners. You won\'t know which Surprise Bags unlock one in advance.
A Special Reward can be a free product or an in-store discount.
Show your voucher in-store to redeem. Some rewards have conditions, so check the details.
Special Rewards expire, so use them before they\'re gone.

You don\'t have any active vouchers
